intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0: 75% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Focus and finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/15. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 15. Target: 90% FTP, 88-95 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/15. Focus and finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final rep. Your body is lying to you — you have more. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 88-95 rpm. Focus on smooth circles, not stomping.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final rep. Leave nothing in reserve. You can rest when you're done.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your lungs will remember this. So will your neighbors from the screaming.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Settle in. Find your breathing. Trust your fitness.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 88-95 rpm, 90% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your competition quit 2 reps ago. You're still here. That's the difference.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Midway through set 1. Power should feel hard but repeatable. Adjust if fading.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Last set! Everything you have. You'll be cooling down in 69 minutes.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Your FTP called. It wants to know why you're trying to destroy it.
coachingNotes.MIXED: High cadence, deep breathing, Seated. This is supposed to hurt.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1: 90% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 90%, Cadence: 88-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1 of 1. Target: 55% FTP, 85-95 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2: 90% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 90%, Cadence: 82-90 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Halfway done. The first half got you here. The second half makes you a champion.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2: target 115%. Breathing should be very labored. If you can talk, go harder.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First rep is always the hardest mentally. Once you're in it, commit.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: this is the exact wattage where people start questioning their life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Last one! Finish strong. You've earned the cooldown.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 82-90 rpm, 90% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: You've got this. Stay focused and execute the plan.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 8. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Last set. Empty the tank. You can rest when you're dead. Or in 5 minutes.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Supra-threshold effort. This is the rep that builds your aerobic ceiling.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This hurts, but you're choosing to be here. That's what separates you.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Set 2 of 3. The suffering is progressive, like the tax system.
coachingNotes.MIXED: This is hard. That's the point. Keep your rhythm.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 10/15. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 10 of 15. Target: 90% FTP, 82-90 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 10. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 10/15. Focus and finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 2: 55% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. Focus and finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 11/15. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 11 of 15. Target: 90% FTP, 75-85 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 11. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 11/15. Focus and finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Your lungs want to quit. Your mind wants to quit. But you won't. Rep 12 of 15.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Rep 12/15 — hold 115% FTP at 75-85 rpm. Seated. 180s of work left in this set.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 12 of 15 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 12: where dreams go to die, and watts go to live.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Almost there. Keep the power smooth and steady.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 13/15. This hurts because it's supposed to. Keep going.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 13 of 15. Target: 90% FTP, 75-85 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 13. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 13/15. Focus and finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 14. Yes, it hurts. That's the price of being faster than yesterday.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: You've accumulated 41min of VO2 work. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Rep 14 of 15 — you've done this before and you can do it again.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 14. Your legs are filing a formal complaint. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 14/15. Power: 115%, Cadence: 75-85 rpm. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 15 of 15. Target: 90% FTP, 75-85 rpm.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 15. Your legs have opinions. Noted.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 15/15. Focus and finish strong.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 55% FTP. Focus on form and execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Every interval makes you stronger. Keep pushing.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: This seemed like a good idea at the time. Still is. Maybe.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Power: 55%, Cadence: 85-95 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. This is the price. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 3: 60% FTP. Seated. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: This is your workout. Own it.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Fun fact: suffering builds character. You're very  character-rich right now.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Stay smooth. Breathe deep. You've got this.
